justification: A research-to-design goal ('find missing development phases ... create our own') is open-ended and needs an explicit intent framing before discovery.
Mandatory spine phase and the core of this cycle — it does the online research to enumerate candidate missing phases from open-source projects/blogs.
Research will surface many candidate phases; triage prunes them to the few worth designing this cycle.
Novel cross-cutting goal (inventing new development phases for the pipeline) warrants a design pass before tdd/build per the cycle_size/novel-goal rubric.
Cycle is non-trivial (introduces new phase concepts), so behavioral predicates must be authored before build.
Mandatory spine phase — implements the chosen new phase(s)/research artifacts.
Mandatory integrity-floor phase — PASS audit is required before ship.
Mandatory spine phase — commits the cycle once build and audit pass.
